title: LT-1247: Post Office door hard-crash on Chapter 3 entry
body: Opening the Post Office door on feature/ch3-postoffice hard-crashes the runtime (null interaction handler). Blocks all Ch3 playtests. P0 before Showcase. Repro 100%.

title: LT-1231: Clerk NPC soft-lock in Post Office queue
body: Talking to the clerk after the door fix path soft-locks the dialogue tree (4 playtest drops). Depends on LT-1247.

title: LT-1218: Postbox double-feedback on interact
body: Postbox fires the pickup feedback twice (9 playtest drops). Lower severity than the crash/soft-lock.

title: LT-1205: Chapter 2 radio state does not persist
body: Radio on/off state resets on room reload (3 drops). Ch2 polish - lowest of the current cluster.
